rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Component implementation annexes are used for implementation-level bindings such as assignments.
Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Do not invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations are not automatically in AGREE expression scope as variables
Model Analyst Agent extracts component structure before AGREE generation
